---
title: "brute_force_knn"
generated: true
description: "Brute-force k-nearest-neighbour search in (optionally projected) feature space."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.smoothing.bilateral`](../nitrix-smoothing-bilateral.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:brute_force_knn -->
```python
brute_force_knn(features: Float[Array, 'n d_f'], k: int, *, metric: Optional[FeatureMetric] = None) -> Int[Array, 'n k']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:brute_force_knn -->
Brute-force k-nearest-neighbour search in (optionally projected) feature space.

Materialises the $(n, n)$ distance matrix; quadratic in
memory.  Practical for $n \lesssim 10\mathrm{k}$.  For larger
$n$, the caller should pre-compute the adjacency with a
spatial-index data structure (KD-tree, grid hashing, mesh k-ring,
etc.) and pass it as `neighbourhood=` to
[`bilateral_gaussian`](../nitrix-smoothing-bilateral/bilateral_gaussian.qmd).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:brute_force_knn -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `features` | `Float` | `n` × `d_f` | — | Per-point feature vectors, `(n, d_f)`. |
| `k` | `int` | — | — | Number of neighbours per query point. The point itself is included in its own `k` (so `k=1` returns self-only). |
| `metric` | `Optional[FeatureMetric]` | — | `None` | Optional [`FeatureMetric`](../nitrix-smoothing-metric/FeatureMetric.qmd). `None` ranks by raw Euclidean distance; when supplied, the search ranks by `sum(metric.project(diff)**2, -1)` -- the same quadratic form [`bilateral_gaussian`](../nitrix-smoothing-bilateral/bilateral_gaussian.qmd) uses for its weights, so the k-NN adjacency matches the weight metric. |

**Returns** `Int` — shape `n` × `k`. Indices of the `k` nearest neighbours for each query point, shape `(n, k)`, sorted by ascending distance.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:brute_force_knn -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `d_f` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `k` | kernel or basis components |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
